title: Company Achieves ISO 27001 Certification
summary: We are proud to announce that our organization has successfully obtained ISO 27001 certification, affirming our commitment to information security management.
body: After months of rigorous preparation and external audit, our organization has been awarded the ISO 27001 certification. This achievement reflects our dedication to maintaining the highest standards of information security across all departments. The certification was conducted by Bureau Veritas and is valid for three years.

title: Q1 All-Hands Meeting — April 1st, 2026
summary: The quarterly all-hands meeting is scheduled for April 1st at 10:00 AM in the main conference hall. Attendance is mandatory for all staff.
body: Leadership will present Q1 results, strategic updates for Q2, and address employee questions. Remote employees can join via the company video conferencing link. Agenda will be distributed via email 48 hours prior.

title: Updated Remote Work Policy — Effective April 1st
summary: The HR department has released an updated remote work policy allowing eligible employees to work remotely up to 2 days per week.
body: Following a company-wide survey and management review, the updated remote work policy now permits eligible employees (those who have completed at least 6 months of service) to work remotely up to 2 days per week. Eligibility criteria, request procedures, and manager approval workflow are detailed in the policy document available in the Policy AI section.

title: Planned IT Maintenance — Saturday March 28th
summary: Scheduled IT system maintenance will take place on Saturday, March 28th from 11 PM to 3 AM. Some systems will be temporarily unavailable.
body: The IT team will be performing essential infrastructure upgrades on Saturday night. The following systems will be affected: ERP System, HR Portal, Email (limited), VPN. Please save your work and log out before 11 PM on Saturday. For urgent assistance, contact the IT on-call line.

title: Ramadan Working Hours — Effective March 2026
summary: Working hours during Ramadan will be reduced to 6 hours per day. Official working hours: 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
body: In accordance with Saudi Labor Law and company policy, official working hours during the holy month of Ramadan will be 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM. All employees are expected to adhere to these hours. Managers should plan workloads accordingly. Ramadan Kareem to all our employees.
